ddls:
CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm (e.g., PSO, DE) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm's methodology */,
  "algorithm_category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID to which the algorithm belongs */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithms_algorithm_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_category_id") REFERENCES algorithm_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark result */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm being evaluated */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the benchmarking session */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the dataset used */,
  "minimum_value" REAL /* Minimum value achieved by the algorithm */,
  "counts" INTEGER /* Count of operations or evaluations performed */,
  "mean_value" REAL /* Mean value of results obtained */,
  "computational_time" REAL /* Time taken to complete the computation in seconds */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration settings used during the benchmark */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_results_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES submission_history ("benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_results_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for user correspondence */,
  "role" INTEGER /* Role ID of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submission_history" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the algorithm */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm being submitted */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the benchmarking session */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the algorithm was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the submission (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the submission was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submission_history_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmark_results ("benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submission_history_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submission_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Metaheuristic, Gradient-based) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
